_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Placenta not expelled even after 30 minutes of the delivery of baby

preauth.label: Detailed clinical notes including Delivery notes (if available) with history, symptoms, signs, examination findings, indications and advice for admission

claim.label: Last Investigation reports of predelivery if available (Haemoglobin, ABO-Rh, Urine Albumin and Sugar)
Documentation of General anaesthesia (preferable) or Intravenous sedation
Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge
Blood transfusion notes (if blood transfusion was given)

ppd_preauth.q: Is there evidence of uterine malformations on Ultrasound/examination?

common_queries: Evidence of uterine malformations found on Ultrasound/examination
Detailed indoor case papers with vitals missing or incomplete
Last pre-delivery investigation reports (Haemoglobin, ABO-Rh, Urine Albumin and Sugar) missing or incomplete
Detailed operative/procedure notes missing or incomplete
Documentation of General anaesthesia or Intravenous sedation missing
Discharge summary with follow-up advice missing or incomplete
Blood transfusion notes missing when transfusion was given

additional_information.special_empanelment: Facilities with well-equipped operation theatre / labour room
additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: MS/ DNB/ DGO or equivalent (Obstetrics & Gynaecology) or possessing a recognized Emergency obstetrics care certification from a government recognized institution.
clinical_key_pointers: Manual removal of placenta is performed when the placenta is not expelled even 30 minutes after the delivery of the baby.
With active management, the placenta is commonly delivered within 5-10 minutes.
quality_assessment_parameters: Ratio of Manual Removal of Placenta to the Number of Vaginal deliveries being carried out in a hospital to be monitored
